mainEntity.name: How much does company registration cost in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 for Pvt Ltd. Covers: DSC, DIN, name approval, SPICe+, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. Government stamp duty included.
RoC Mumbai, located at Everest Building, 4th Floor, 100 Marine Drive, Mumbai 400002. Virtual Auditor's Mumbai office coordinates with this RoC for all filings.

mainEntity.name: Do you have a physical office in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400062. Walk-in consultations available by appointment. Call +91 77000 89597 to schedule.

mainEntity.name: How long does registration take in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-15 working days. Mumbai-specific factors: MCA portal processing is national (not city-dependent), but local notarization, stamp duty, and address verification may vary.

mainEntity.name: Can I register an LLP in Mumbai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. LLP registration from ₹10,000. Filed with the Central Registration Centre (CRC). Post-registration compliance handled by our Mumbai office.
Yes. Annual filings, statutory audit, GST, TDS, board resolutions, and FEMA/FDI compliance (if you raise foreign investment) — all from our Mumbai office.
